EmailTemplate.description: Response for if a referee is chasing vouchers and there are none due.
EmailTemplate.name: RAF - No Vouchers Due (new process)
EmailTemplate.subject: Your RAF Referral
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
We can confirm that 1 of the referrals you made has not been successful.
Due to the Data Protection Act, we are unable to supply any details relating to another customer. However, we have added below some common scenarios that can lead to a referral being unsuccessful.
Why has my referral been unsuccessful?
Here are some of the common reasons, why a referral may be unsuccessful: - They chose not to join our RAF scheme - They chose not to get a quote from Kingsbridge - They already had a quote open with Kingsbridge prior to your referral - They chose not to purchase an insurance policy from Kingsbridge - They already held a policy with Kingsbridge - They opted to cancel their Kingsbridge insurance policy during their legal cooling off period
You may be able to get more information by speaking with the person you referred. We are happy to speak with them directly to explain the circumstances if required.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
